item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Drones Strike Russian Baltic Port of Primorsk
item.description: Ukraine launched drone attacks hitting the Baltic Sea port of Primorsk, setting it on fire and striking vessels. The attack targets Russian energy infrastructure as Ukraine escalates strikes deep inside Russian territory.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Proposes 30-Day Deadline to End War With US and Israel
item.description: Iran has presented a proposal seeking a comprehensive resolution within 30 days rather than extending the ceasefire. Trump expressed skepticism about the offer while saying he would review it.

item.title: 🇵🇸 Israeli Raid in West Bank Kills One Palestinian
item.description: A Palestinian man was killed and four others wounded during an Israeli military raid in Nablus. The incident adds to escalating violence in the occupied West Bank.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK Tests New Skyhammer Interceptor Missiles in Jordan
item.description: The United Kingdom successfully tested a new British-built interceptor missile system designed to counter Iranian Shahed drones. The Skyhammer system has a 30km range and can reach speeds of 700 km/h, strengthening protection for UK forces and Gulf partners.

item.title: 🇪🇺 Poland's Tusk Warns NATO is Disintegrating After US Troop Withdrawal
item.description: Polish Prime Minister Donald Tusk declared NATO is disintegrating following the US announcement to withdraw 5,000 troops from Germany. He warned the greatest threat to the transatlantic community is not external enemies but the ongoing disintegration of the alliance.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Offers Trump One-Month Deadline to End Conflict
item.description: Iran has proposed a deal with a one-month deadline for negotiations to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and end the war. The proposal would end the US naval blockade and the Lebanon conflict, with nuclear talks to follow the initial agreement.

item.title: 🇵🇭 China-Philippines Trade Accusations Over South China Sea Landings
item.description: China accused Philippine troops of illegally landing on a disputed sandbar in the Spratly Islands, while Manila vowed to dispatch ships to drive off Chinese vessels conducting what it called illegal research. The tensions come during joint US-Philippines military drills.

item.title: 🚢 Two Women Die in Channel Crossing Attempt Off French Coast
item.description: Two women died after a boat carrying about 80 migrants capsized near Calais while attempting to cross the English Channel to Britain. The victims were believed to be Sudanese women in their 20s.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇵🇭 China and Philippines Trade Accusations Over Disputed South China Sea Reef
item.description: China accused the Philippines of landing personnel on a disputed reef while Manila said it would dispatch ships to drive off Chinese vessels conducting illegal research. The latest escalation in territorial tensions comes amid ongoing disputes in the strategic waterway.

item.title: 🇮🇱✈️ Israel Approves Multi-Billion Dollar Fighter Jet Purchase from US
item.description: Israel gave final approval to purchase two new combat squadrons of F-35 and F-15IA advanced fighter aircraft from Lockheed Martin and Boeing. The deal, worth tens of billions of dollars, significantly strengthens Israeli air power amid regional tensions.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Trump Warns US Could Restart Iran Strikes If Tehran Misbehaves
item.description: President Trump said the US could resume strikes on Iran if the regime misbehaves, while expressing dissatisfaction with Irans proposed 14-point peace deal. Trump said he prefers a non-military path but remains skeptical of Tehrans intentions.

item.title: 🇺🇦🇷🇺 Russia and Ukraine Give Conflicting Accounts of Sumy Region Fighting
item.description: Russias Defence Ministry claimed its troops took control of Myropillia village in Ukraines Sumy region, but Ukraines military denied the village had changed hands. The conflicting reports highlight ongoing intense fighting along the northeastern front.

item.title: 🇻🇦 Rubio to Visit Vatican and Italy After Trump-Pope Tensions
item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio will travel to the Vatican and Italy for meetings this week, following President Trump's public attacks on Pope Leo that drew criticism from Christians across the political spectrum.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Hezbollah Pays Steep Price as Israel Dismantles Its Strongholds
item.description: Israel has displaced hundreds of thousands of Hezbollah's Shi'ite constituents and killed thousands of its fighters, while domestic rivals harden opposition against the group's armed status in Lebanon.

item.title: 🇸🇰🇷🇺 Slovakia PM Fico to Attend Victory Day Parade in Moscow
item.description: Prime Minister Robert Fico is among a handful of global leaders attending Russia's scaled-back Victory Day parade, highlighting divisions within Europe over engagement with Moscow.

item.title: 🛢️ OPEC+ Agrees Third Oil Output Hike Since Hormuz Closure
item.description: OPEC+ will agree to a modest oil output hike, but the increase will remain largely symbolic as the US-Iran war continues to disrupt Gulf oil supplies through the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: 🇰🇵 North Korea Rejects US Cyber Threat Claims as Fabrication
item.description: Pyongyang's foreign ministry dismissed US accusations of cyber threats as disinformation aimed at justifying Washington's hostile policy, warning of countermeasures.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russia faces worker shortage crisis as war depletes labor force
item.description: Russia has run out of workers for the first time in its post-Soviet history, with record-low 2.1% unemployment driven by military conscription, emigration, and demographics. Central Bank warns labor shortages are driving inflation, forcing interest rates to 14.5%.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukrainian drone strikes on Tuapse refinery cause major oil spill disaster
item.description: Hundreds of tons of oil leaked into the Black Sea after Ukrainian drone strikes on Russia's Tuapse refinery, creating an ecological disaster. Russian authorities delayed declaring emergency for 12 days, worsening contamination of air, soil and water.

item.title: 🇸🇦 Saudi Arabia and UAE lead push for Hormuz-bypass trade corridors
item.description: Middle Eastern states are dusting off proposals for overland pipelines and rail-sea corridors to bypass the Strait of Hormuz, building a new trade architecture connecting Indian Ocean ports to Mediterranean via Saudi Arabia, Jordan and Syria.

item.title: 🇹🇼 Taiwan President Defies China with Surprise Eswatini Visit
item.description: Taiwan President Lai Ching-te arrived in Eswatini for a surprise diplomatic visit, asserting Taiwan right to engage with the world despite Beijing calling him a rat and attempting to stop the trip.

item.title: 🚢 Two Dead as Migrant Boat Runs Aground in France
item.description: A small boat carrying 82 migrants ran aground on a beach in northern France, leaving two women dead and 16 injured. This is the third deadly incident involving Channel crossings in just over a month.

item.title: 🇮🇱✈️ Israel Approves Purchase of F-35 and F-15IA Fighter Jet Squadrons
item.description: Israel gave final approval to purchase two new combat squadrons of F-35 and F-15IA fighter aircraft from Lockheed Martin and Boeing, part of a $119 billion military buildup plan for the coming decade.

item.title: 🛢️🚨 Oil Tanker Hijacked Off Yemen Coast Near Somalia
item.description: An oil tanker was hijacked off the coast of Yemen and taken towards Somalia, marking the second such incident in the past 10 days amid ongoing regional instability.

item.title: 🇨🇺🇺🇸 Cuba Condemns New US Sanctions as Illegal and Abusive
item.description: Cuba denounced new US sanctions as illegal and abusive, adding to existing US oil blockade measures that have caused widespread blackouts and fuel shortages across the island nation.
